en: Check my {account} balance, and set an alert if it drops below {threshold}.
Could you check my {account} balance and set an alert if it falls below {threshold}?
Please look up my {account} balance and notify me if it drops under {threshold}.

看看{account}里还有多少钱，然后设定一个阈值低于{threshold}就会报警的提醒。
